ItacAcademyItem.Name: Ottusi (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: In his lettere, Giovanfrancesco Loredan wrote that he attended meetings of this Academy in Bologna . See Loredan, Lettere (1655). For the Academy motto and emblem, see Mario Fanti, Notizie e insegne delle Accademie di Bologna da un manoscritto del secolo XVII (Bologna: Rotary Club, 1983).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
